aiDescription:
## Dumpster Rental in Columbia, South Carolina

Columbia residents trust us to deliver roll-off containers throughout the state capital. Our team positions dumpsters and hauls debris from projects across Columbia, from downtown to the suburbs. We provide reliable [roll-off dumpster services](/roll-off-dumpster-rental) with same-day delivery.

## Why Columbia Chooses Dumpster Champs

Flat-rate pricing with no hidden fees. Every rental includes delivery, pickup, and disposal. We protect driveways at no extra cost.

**Columbia Service Features:**
- Same-day delivery throughout Richland County
- Flexible 7 to 14-day rentals
- Driveway protection included
- All sizes: 10 to 40-yard

## Columbia Dumpster Pricing

| Size | Price | Weight Included | Best For |
|------|-------|-----------------|----------|
| 10 Yard | $495 | 2 tons | Small cleanouts |
| 15 Yard | $550 | 2.5 tons | Garage cleanouts |
| 20 Yard | $595 | 3 tons | Remodeling (Most Popular) |
| 30 Yard | $695 | 4 tons | Full renovation |
| 40 Yard | $795 | 5 tons | Large construction |

*Prices include delivery, pickup, and disposal. Overage: $75/ton.*

## South Carolina Climate

Columbia's humid subtropical climate means hot summers. Spring and fall are ideal for [outdoor renovation projects](/residential-dumpsters). Year-round projects work with planning.

Common projects include home renovations, estate cleanouts, and [construction debris removal](/construction-dumpsters).

## Columbia Permit Information

Dumpsters on private property typically don't require permits. Street placement needs city approval.

Call (888) 860-0710 for Columbia pricing.

faqs.question: How much is dumpster rental in Columbia?
faqs.answer: Columbia rentals start at $495 for 10-yard.

faqs.question: Do I need a permit?
faqs.answer: Private property typically needs no permit.

faqs.question: What size for home renovation?
faqs.answer: Most renovations work with 20 or 30-yard.

faqs.question: Do you serve Lexington?
faqs.answer: Yes! We serve all Midlands communities.

faqs.question: Best time for SC projects?
faqs.answer: Spring and fall are ideal.
